response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive experience as a full-stack engineer with 10+ years in diverse environments, including senior roles at companies like Optilyz and re:cinq. His expertise spans multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Java, Kotlin, D), cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes), and testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest). He has direct experience with AI agent infrastructure and demonstrates a strong focus on clean, testable code, scalability, and user-centric solutions. His leadership in open-source projects and mentorship through workshops further highlights his alignment with the role's requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across frontend (React, Ember.js) and backend (Node.js, Nest.js, Java, Kotlin) with modern tooling (TypeScript, Vitest, Docker).
Strong background in cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes) and database systems (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL), with proven scalability and performance optimization skills.
Demonstrated expertise in AI agent development and infrastructure, aligning with the emerging technologies requirement.
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, though proficient in Node.js and backend development.
No explicit mention of Playwright testing framework, though Vitest and Jest are highlighted.
Current role (re:cinq) is very recent (April 2025), but prior experience at Optilyz and other companies is strong.

key_factors.factor: Full-stack experience and primary stack alignment
AI agent development and modern infrastructure
